airline_id: Schema Enforcement: Enforces strict column data types during CSV read.
Quality Checks: Filters out records with missing airline_id values.
Deduplication: Removes any duplicate airline_id records in the incoming batch.
Data Standardization: Trims trailing whitespaces and formats airline names to proper case (initcap).
Data Enrichment: Maps countries to ISO 2-letter codes and continents/regions.
Key Generation: Generates a hash-based surrogate key (airline_sk) using SHA-256.
Auditing: Appends ingestion_timestamp to log when the record was processed.
